description_long: This cushion is shaped like an elephant, featuring a playful and whimsical design. The main body is covered in a dark fabric adorned with a repeating pattern of red and white starburst or floral motifs, while the head, trunk, and ears are a solid coral pink. The cushion has a large, cartoonish eye on each side, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The trunk is curled upward, adding to the characterful look. The surface appears soft and plush, suggesting it is filled with a lightweight material. This cushion would add a touch of fun and comfort to any urban seating area, especially in parks or community spaces.
description: A soft, elephant-shaped cushion with a coral pink head and trunk, and a dark body featuring a red and white starburst pattern. It has large cartoon eyes and a whimsical, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elephant's coral pink head, curled trunk, and large eye, with the patterned body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting both cartoon eyes, the rounded head, and the upward-curled trunk.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other eye and the patterned body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full patterned back and the rounded shape of the cushion, with no facial features visible.
attribute_location: children's play area bench or urban park seating
attribute_placement: placed on a bench or seat as a decorative and functional cushion
